title: cyanea regina
intro: Cyanea regina, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyanea regina include soothing skin irritations, reducing stress, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Cyanea regina include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
